jd-parser.description: Extract structured requirements from job descriptions
jd-parser.testPrompt: Extract skills from this job description and return JSON with hard_skills array: Looking for a Python developer with Django and PostgreSQL experience.

resume-parser.description: Parse resumes into structured candidate data
resume-parser.testPrompt: Parse this resume into JSON with name, skills array, and experience array: John Smith, Software Engineer, 5 years Python experience at Google.

rewrite-suggester.testPrompt: Rewrite this resume bullet to match a Python developer job: Built web apps using JavaScript. Return JSON with suggested_rewrite field.

cover-letter.testPrompt: Write a 2-sentence cover letter opening for a software engineer role at Google. Return JSON with full_letter field.
